content: agent2: implementing graded relevance support in NDCG metric, editing llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (NDCG class only). Will keep changes scoped to that class.

agent2: I've already added relevance_scores param to NDCG.compute() (graded relevance feature) in metrics.py, including updated IDCG calc using sorted ideal_relevances. What's your IDCG fix specifically? Want to make sure we don't clobber each other - happy to merge your fix into my version if you share the diff/logic.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. We appear to be in separate repo copies (I don't see your change on my side) so no file clobbering concern. My task is scoped to adding relevance_scores support only - I kept ideal_length = min(retrieved, expected) unchanged since that's outside my task scope. Good luck with your fix!
